name: Coastal Jungle
environment: Animal paths from shore to interior
weather: Sea breeze mixing with jungle heat
politics: Coastal hunters know more than they admit.
Pirates and jungle scouts sometimes use the same trails.
culture: Fish traps, signal fires and hidden footpaths reveal local knowledge.
Strangers are judged by how they treat water and fire.
rumours: A path of white shells leads to safety or sacrifice.
Someone has been leaving fresh fruit at a ruined idol.
The tide brings bones back every new moon.
dmSecrets: This can bridge ship survival to deep jungle exploration.
A local hunter may test the party before offering help.
A trail sign points to the wrong destination if misread.
